classification.underlying: IREN. investing directly in the common

overview.description: Under normal market circumstances, the advisor will maintain at least 80% exposure to financial instruments that provide two times inverse leveraged exposure to the daily performance of IREN. investing directly in the common stock of IREN. The fund is non-diversified.
